TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall backup for BWH Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Firewall to perform the weekly backup for the BWH firewall.Downloaded the backup file and placed the same backup file on the file server under the E drive Client folder in the BWH folde

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Maintenance Window : BWH : 9pm Friday to 3am Saturday and 9pm Saturday to 3am Sunday PST
TimeEntry.Notes:
Downloaded below Patches Manually and installed on below server and workstations.

 


APP01, RA01, BW-ACCT01, BW-ACCT02, BWLAP-01

Security Update for Microsoft .NE

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Latest Agent version (11.2.2315.13.w) updated on the following machines - BWWS017-PC, BWWS024-PC.
TimeEntry.Notes: We logged into the Manage Engine portal and found that a new agent version 11.2.2315.13.w) had been released, and I attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but it failed. So I connected to the M

TimeEntry.Title: Missing grouping tag added on machine BWWS009-PC
TimeEntry.Notes:
Reviewed the Crowd Strike portal and found the Crowd Strike missing grouping tag on machine BWWS009-PC. So assign the grouping tag to machines as per standard .
Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes Software Updated Version (Ver. 1.2.0.1073):- BWW-ALEX
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewing the Malwarebytes portal, we found that the Machines are running with old Malwarebytes Agent Ver. 1.2.0.1059 Use the update command. It was effectively updated on the machines (BWW-ALEX) w

TimeEntry.Title: [ALPHA.MYSNMP.TECHNIJIAN.COM] fs01.brandywinedev.local Disk Free: F:\ Label:New Volume Serial Number 6cb442f6 (SNMP Disk Free) Down (Could not find data for F:\ Label:New Volume Serial Number 6cb44
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to server and Found F Drive was empty so logged into esxi host and deleted F Drive, also deleted the disk sensor from Alpha PRTG portal

TimeEntry.Title: [ALPHA.MYSNMP.TECHNIJIAN.COM] ra01.brandywinedev.local Disk Free: C:\ Label: Serial Number 888ba519 (SNMP Disk Free) Down (15 % (Free Space) is below the error limit of 50 % in Free Space)
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to server and Found only few MB left in C drive, run free disk space and analyzed the data, Found one Drive was setup on few user machine, so asked Kraig to get the  password for Saule,

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Karen's Havens - Outlook is not working
TimeEntry.Notes: Got mail from Phonethep, Regarding outlook issue to Karen , Connect on Karen machine and did troubleshoot, Reconfigure outlook profile but getting error ,unencrypt profile, Restart the computer a

TimeEntry.Notes: Got the email on support from <span style="color:#242424;font-family:'Segoe UI', 'Segoe UI Web (West European)', 'Segoe UI', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-seri

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Sandy’s computer
TimeEntry.Notes: connected to user Machine and found all folder desktop and download, showing red alert on it, and getting error low disk space in one Drive, checked the size and it was only 8 GB used, so reconfigured

TimeEntry.Title: Outlook issue on (TABLET-KLFSQ9HN)
TimeEntry.Notes: User facing the issue on outlook, some of emails are stuck in outbox.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Payment
TimeEntry.Notes:
Got mail from the user to check if their security is also compromised

So after checking with Ajay sir.

login to the o365 portals and verify the users account and also trace some user ac

TimeEntry.Title: RA01 backup job failed due to Low disk space on datastore
TimeEntry.Notes: As checked and found the RA01 backup job failed due to low disk space on the datastore so checked and confirmed that the only VM was in the datastore and reset of all VMs were on different datastore s

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan required: ACCOUNTING-02
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Malwarebytes portal and found that a scan is needed on the (Accounting-02). Pushed the command for scanning.Verified that scan completed successfully without any issues found. Hence cl

TimeEntry.Title: [ALPHA.MYSNMP.TECHNIJIAN.COM] app01.brandywinedev.local Memory: Physical Memory (SNMP Memory) Down (2 % (Percent Available Memory) is below the error limit of 10 % in Percent Available Memory)
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machine App01 and analyzed memory usage in the task manager. Found multiple processes consuming memory. Killed the processes which were not required, and memory usage came to normal.

TimeEntry.Title: Missing grouping tag added in crowd strike portal for APP01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Reviewed the Crowd Strike portal and found the Crowd Strike missing grouping tag on machine APP01. So assign the grouping tag to machines as per standard .
Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Adobe needs to be reinstalled on my computer
TimeEntry.Notes: Received a mail from user as user needs to reinstalled adobe on her computer. We have downloaded and installed the same on her system. Checked as well, it is working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Spam mail alert from Pon, changed email password for user
TimeEntry.Notes: Spam mail alert from Pon, changed email password for user

TimeEntry.Title: Going through mail trace for BWH users in O365 to check for any suspicious activity
TimeEntry.Notes: Going through mail trace for BWH users in O365 to check for any suspicious activity

TimeEntry.Notes: Generated Easydmarc SPF Records updated in Godaddy and verified records are upto date

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop
TimeEntry.Notes: Wiping new PC downgrading it to windows 10, installing updates windows and Dell drivers, installing tech tools. (PC purchase for Kim)

TimeEntry.Title: Email compromise
TimeEntry.Notes: Looking into mail compromise setting up MFA for Pon, resetting pw, and cleaning up Rules

TimeEntry.Title: Outlook issue on (TABLET-KLFSQ9HN)
TimeEntry.Notes: Looking over slow PC for John, resources look minimule usage emailed and request time with to explain the issues.

TimeEntry.Title: Traci BWH had issue with Adobe
TimeEntry.Notes: Traci BWH had issue with Adobe, connected to machine & found Adobe Reader free version installed, asked her to confirm with Dave about license & get back, she confirmed she had a license &

TimeEntry.Title: Help with Myle Phan computer
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to users machine & found error with onedrive so checked the app was closed so opened the onedrive app & resynced files and error message went away.

TimeEntry.Title: Adobe Pro
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to Julia's machine & found all PDFs were opening on the web browser so changed default app to Adobe & issue was resolved for the user, tested on few documents.

TimeEntry.Notes: Assisting Saule with inform XL and onedrive issues

TimeEntry.Notes: Connected Mario' Computer and fixed the One Drive issue. Now OneDrive is synced successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: Chris Courtney - Outlook missing Plugins for Zoom and Teams

TimeEntry.Notes: Login on Prtg portal and found alerts for E drive so tried to troubleshoot and change the sensors now all sensors were up.

TimeEntry.Title: BWH portal cleanup
TimeEntry.Notes: Opening case with Ingram micro to remove partnership.

TimeEntry.Title: Outlook issue on BWH-sales-sur-01
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the email from David, he was facing the issue while trying to open the outlook from remote server. I had taken the remote of his computer and check; this was the error while sending the new

TimeEntry.Title: Outlook issue on BWH-sales-sur-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to RA-01 Server, tried to repair o365 files manually but no luck, then repaired O365 and fixed the issue

TimeEntry.Title: OneDrive issue BWWS019-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the email user was facing the issue with OneDrive. PDF files were not opening. I have login OneDrive on web and select the sync option. Syncing was started and all the files were downloaded.

TimeEntry.Title: Assistance with connecting with onedrive
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected with user & set up Teams for him & synced OneDrive files share & projects folders.

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes Software Updated Version (Ver. 1.2.0.1074):- BWLAP-01, BWWS003-PC, BWWS013-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewing the Malwarebytes portal, we found that the Machines are running with old Malwarebytes Agent Ver. 1.2.0.1073 Use the update command from the portal. It was effectively updated on the machi

TimeEntry.Title: Added spf records From Compliant list in Easydmarc
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into Easydmarc portal and found SPF and DKICM score was Low, so checked the Compliant and Found few records were missing, so added them in easydmarc and it takes 24 hours to updatem will

TimeEntry.Title: latest Malware Byte Protection service version updated - 4.6.2.281 - DC04, FS01, FS02, RG01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into Malware byte Portal and found that the Machine is running with old Malwarebytes Protection version, latest Malware Byte Protection service version updated - 4.6.2.281 on below computers&nb

TimeEntry.Title: Printer Error
TimeEntry.Notes: Called Sarah, followed the documents and applied 6 steps but nothing worked, so sarah sent email to support and let us know if she needed any help

TimeEntry.Title: RE: While buying the license getting the error ... - TrackingID#2310240030000595
TimeEntry.Notes: Opened case with Support, logged into portal and tried to purchase the license and same error, sent email to Support with Screenshot and waiting for reply

TimeEntry.Title: Checked devices in Cisco Umbrella for BWH
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked devices in Cisco Umbrella for BWH

TimeEntry.Title: Cleared the alerts for BWH-BKP-01 on PRTG alpha portal
RE: While buying the license getting the error ... - TrackingID#2310240030000595
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the response from the support they required the screen record of reoccurring the issue and sent it again, they requested the trace and provided them they have escalated the issue to the next

TimeEntry.Title: Help with Newstar
TimeEntry.Notes: Contacted Liz, she was manually placing the pc to sleep during lunch. I spoke to and she was ok just locking. closing ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Latest Agent version (11.2.2315.13.w) updated on the machine - BWWS007-PC, BWws003-PC.
TimeEntry.Notes: We logged into the Manage Engine portal and found that a new agent version 11.2.2315.13.w) had been released, and I attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but it failed. So I connected to the M

TimeEntry.Title: Crowd strike grouping tags missing on BWWS023-PC
TimeEntry.Notes:
Log in to the portal and check the grouping tags that were missed on the computer below. Assign the computer to the correct group, and then update the policy accordingly

 

B

TimeEntry.Title: PDF not opening.... AGAIN
TimeEntry.Notes: Received an email from user as user was facing some issue with PDF files. Connected the machine on My Remote. Checked and troubleshooted the issue and found issue with some specific pdf files as these

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike Agent Ver. 7.01.17312.0 updated with latest Sensor Ver. 7.04.17605.0 on the following machines - BWWS006-PC, BWWS014-PC, BWws004-PC, BWws003-PC.

Reviewing the Crowdstrike portal, we found that the following machine - 
BWWS006-PC, BWWS014-PC, BWws004-PC, BWws003-PC had a pending Crowdstrike update. So I updated the latest Crowdstrike&

TimeEntry.Title: Richard with BWH is having issues with his computer and needs assistance
TimeEntry.Notes: User called in said he is not able to acess the files. so connect to the user machine.Computer is very slow its taking long time to open anything.User is not able to access OneDrive files it showing X

TimeEntry.Title: Richard with BWH is having issues with his computer and needs assistance
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on machines for slowness issue, disk defregmentation, disk cleanup, removed temporary files, as per now system is working fine
TimeEntry.Resource: A. Kumar Poddar CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

Review the my remote portal, and found the machine BWWS023-PC running with old version 23.2.9.8466 of screenconnect.
So tried to install the agent from my remote portal but not successded. So con

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Maintenance Window : BWH : 9pm Friday to 3am Saturday and 9pm Saturday to 3am Sunday PST

TimeEntry.Title: PRTG all sensor alert on ra01.
TimeEntry.Notes:
A review of the PRTG portal revealed that the device's alert was thrown (
ra01). Except for the Ping, all sensors are in the acknowledgement state. To alter the status to UP, try refreshing al

TimeEntry.Title: Verifying devices in MyRMM & MyRemote
TimeEntry.Notes: Verifying devices in MyRMM & MyRemote.

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall Backup- BWH
TimeEntry.Notes: Firewall backup has been taken successfully and uploaded to the file server. Location E:\Clients\BWH\Network Device config\Firewall\

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan pending on BWH-Sales-Sur-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the malwarebytes portal and found Malwarebytes scan pending on BWH-Sales-Sur-01.So tried to  scheduled the scanning  from portal.
Scanning is completed. Hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: [ALPHA.MYSNMP.TECHNIJIAN.COM] Probe Device (DC04) Probe Health (Probe Health) Down (Probe disconnected (Disconnected))
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the alert probe, DC04 is disconnected from the portal. The machine was logged in the Probe device and found PRTG Probe service needed to restart as the PRT

TimeEntry.Title: Carson Landing can't log in VPN this morning
TimeEntry.Notes: As per request from the user verified and informed them there was an issue maybe due to a power outage. As checked with ISP there is no issue from their end. We have checked the route to verify the IS

TimeEntry.Title: Set VM's on auto start through ESXI host
TimeEntry.Notes: As per instructions from Hamid accessed the VBR server login into the ESXI host and enabled and configured VMs on auto start through the ESXI host set the priority and set the delayed time.

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan required on following machines - BWLAP-18, BWWS028-PC, BWWS016-PC.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the Malwarebytes portal and found that a scan are needed on following machines - BWLAP-18, BWWS028-PC, BWWS016-PC. 
Pushed the command for scanning. Verified that scan completed

TimeEntry.Title: BWH - Site Down
TimeEntry.Notes: helped India troubleshoot and fix the issue with bwh site.

TimeEntry.Title: Rebooted Server RA01
TimeEntry.Notes: after implementing the patch management the below computer was stood for restarting. Restarting the computer to deploy the patch on the computer so that the user can work smoothly in working days. Aft

TimeEntry.Title: Checked and verified the machines on CIsco Umbrella
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and verified the machines on Cisco Umbrella.

TimeEntry.Title: Myremote agent udpate - BWH-HQ-VONE, FS01, RA01, RG01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Pushed myremote latest agent from server but it did not update, so connected to server, downloaded and installed Manually. now it shows uptodate
